message:
fix(tests): wrap seed functions in BEGIN IMMEDIATE transactions

All 5 test seed functions now use atomic transactions to prevent
partial database state if any operation fails mid-setup:

- seed_mailbox_db: 7 raw SQL operations
- seed_products_cli_db: 11 parameterized operations
- seed_acks_and_reservations_db: 8 parameterized operations
- seed_mail_status_db: schema + project + 2 agents + 3 messages
- seed_projects_adopt_db: schema + 2 projects + 2 agents + msg + reservation

SQLite auto-rollbacks uncommitted transactions on connection drop,
so panics before COMMIT are safely handled. Enhanced panic messages
now include db_path for easier debugging.

Also filters false positives (rsync, grep, editors) in legacy
Python process detection.

Closes #27, closes #28, closes #29, closes #30, closes #31

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
